PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEYRO, ROBERT F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDANIEL, ROBERT , JR.   ATTN: HOUSEKEEPING DEPT. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $508.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
